Introduction
    Sophia and Luke make an unexpected and fateful connection with Ira, a 90-years old man, when they save him from a car crash. Ira's memories of his own decades-long romance with his beloved wife deeply inspire the young couple.

Filming locations: Lawrence Joel Veterans Memorial Coliseum - 2825 University Parkway, Winston-Salem, North Carolina, USA
